title: Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
